news.headline: Google researchers introduce 'faithful uncertainty', allowing LLMs to offer best guesses instead of hallucinations
news.summary: Large language models continue to struggle with hallucinations, presenting a major roadblock for real-world enterprise applications. Reducing these errors is a messy business, forcing model developers to navigate a strict tradeoff where eliminating factual errors often suppresses valid answers.
news.classification_reason: Research commentary on AI reliability, not a material company event.
